get.description: Retrieve the available and pending Stripe balances for the store associated with the provided store ID. This endpoint is essential for financial analysis and management, helping stores track earnings and pending transactions.

200.description: Available and pending balances for the store.

get.description:
Retrieve a paginated list of orders for a specific customer by their ID, filtered by the store ID. This endpoint returns details such as order status, amounts, and associated products, allowing you to analyze a customer's purchasing behavior.

**Business Use Case:** Understand customer purchases and history for personalized marketing and support services.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the customer to list orders for.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of items to retrieve per page.

401.description: Unauthorized: Missing or invalid store ID.

post.description:
Generate a 15-minute magic link that logs the customer into their portal at app.blink.store/my-orders. This endpoint facilitates direct access using a temporary token, enhancing the user experience by providing quick and secure access to order history.

**Business Use Case:** Enhance customer convenience by enabling temporary, secure access to order management features.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the customer to create a portal session for.

201.description: Success: Link to customer portal session created.

401.description: Unauthorized: Missing or invalid store ID.

get.description:
Retrieve all active subscriptions for a given customer by their ID. Returns subscription details and associated product information, aiding subscription management.

**Business Use Case:** Monitor customer subscriptions and manage recurring revenue effectively.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the customer to list subscriptions for.

401.description: Unauthorized: Missing or invalid store ID.

get.description: Retrieve a list of orders for the store identified by `x-store-id`. Supports filtering by `status`, `customer_id`, and `product_id`. Utilizing this endpoint provides a detailed view into customer purchases and sales trends.

401.description: Unauthorized access without a valid store ID.

get.description: Fetch complete details of a specific order by its ID, verifying ownership using `x-store-id`. The response includes customer, product, and financial information relevant for auditing or customer support.

post.description: Process a refund for a specific order, identified by its ID. This action updates the order status and creates a refund transaction in Stripe. The endpoint enables handling full or partial refunds, enhancing customer satisfaction and compliance with financial policies.

400.description: Bad request due to invalid input.

get.description:
Fetch a list of orders associated with the authenticated customer. This endpoint requires a bearer token in the `Authorization` header to identify the customer. It helps customers view their order history.

**Business Use Case:** Allow customers to review past purchases and track order statuses.

**Responses:**
- **200:** A list of customer's orders along with pagination metadata.
- **401:** Unauthorized if no valid token is provided.

200.description: Successful operation with the list of orders.

post.description:
Create a new customer session for accessing personal portal information. Returns a token that should be used for subsequent portal API requests.

**Business Use Case:** Enhance customer experience by enabling secure and seamless access to personal order and subscription information.

**Responses:**
- **200:** A token is returned that can be used for authenticated requests.

200.description: Session successfully created with a return token.

get.description:
Retrieve a list of active subscriptions for the authenticated customer. Requires a bearer token in the `Authorization` header to identify the customer. Useful for customers to manage and view their subscriptions.

**Business Use Case:** Enable customers to check statuses, renewal dates, and details of their active subscriptions.

**Responses:**
- **200:** A list of customer's subscriptions with pagination metadata.
- **401:** Unauthorized if no valid token is provided.

200.description: Successful operation with the list of subscriptions.

cart_id.description: The ID of the abandoned cart to send a recovery email for.

status.description: The new status of the affiliate.

email.description: The email of the affiliate to invite.

membership_id.description: The ID of the affiliate membership.

code.description: The code for the tracking link.

name.description: The updated name of the audience member.

status.description: The updated status of the audience member.
The new status of the audience member, indicating unsubscription.

membership_id.description: The ID of the affiliate membership to update.

action.description: The action to perform (approve, reject, ban).

html.description: The HTML content of the email.

recipients_type.description: The type of recipients for the broadcast.

tag.description: The tag to add to the customer.

customer_id.description: The ID of the customer to remove the tag from.

tag.description: The tag to be removed from the customer.

description.description: The updated description of the bump.

badge_title.description: The updated badge title of the bump.

badge_color.description: The updated badge color of the bump.

badge_color.description: The badge color for the bump.

design.description: Design settings for the checkout link.

status.description: The status of the checkout link.

status.description: Updated status of the checkout link.

variant_id.description: The ID of the product variant.

customer_email.description: The customer's email for the checkout.

success_url.description: URL to redirect upon successful checkout.

cancel_url.description: URL to redirect upon checkout cancellation.

return_url.description: URL to return to after checkout flow.

metadata.description: Additional metadata to attach to the session.

name.description: The updated name of the customer.

email.description: The updated email of the customer.

status.description: The updated status of the customer.

name.description: The name of the new customer.

email.description: The email address of the new customer.

code.description: The unique code for the discount.

discount_amount.description: The amount or percentage of the discount.

name.description: The updated name for the discount.

code.description: The updated unique code for the discount.

discount_type.description: The updated type of discount, either `percentage` or `fixed`.

discount_amount.description: The updated amount or percentage of the discount.

expires_at.description: The updated expiration date for the discount.

subject.description: The subject of the broadcast email.

html.description: The HTML content of the email.

tag.description: The tag used to specify target customer segment.

eventData.description: Additional data to be recorded with the event.

url.description: The URL associated with the event.

product_id.description: The ID of the related product.

variant_id.description: The ID of the related product variant.

amount.description: Amount to refund in cents. If left undefined, the full amount will be refunded.

email.description: Email of the member to add.
